summary: Tested 6 bug fixes for ThreatBase/AssetIQ. All fixes verified working: Password reset API, Failure Mode fullscreen, Validation avatar, Form Builder discipline, Mobile menu position, and Feedback button visibility.

minor.issue: Form template creation fails with DuplicateKeyError - id field is null. Pre-existing issue, not related to current bug fixes.

action_items: Fix form template creation - id field is null causing DuplicateKeyError (pre-existing issue)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 bug fixes verified working. Form template creation has a pre-existing bug (id field null) that should be fixed separately.

bug_fix_1_password_reset.description: CRITICAL: Fix 'Forgot password' in User Management returning 'Failed to fetch'
bug_fix_1_password_reset.details: Password reset API endpoint /api/auth/admin-reset-password works correctly. Returns success message and sends email.

bug_fix_2_fullscreen_mode.description: HIGH: Failure Mode view should be full-screen
bug_fix_2_fullscreen_mode.details: Fullscreen toggle button found in view panel. Clicking it activates fullscreen overlay (fixed inset-0 z-50). Exit fullscreen works.

bug_fix_3_validation_avatar.description: HIGH: Validation in Failure Modes does not show picture
bug_fix_3_validation_avatar.details: Validation dialog shows current user avatar preview. Validated failure modes show validator avatar or fallback.

bug_fix_4_discipline_dropdown.description: MEDIUM: Discipline content in Form Builder is not correct
bug_fix_4_discipline_dropdown.details: Form Builder discipline dropdown uses DISCIPLINES constant values (Mechanical, Electrical, Instrumentation, etc.)

bug_fix_5_mobile_menu_position.description: MEDIUM: Mobile UI - place the menu button on the left
bug_fix_5_mobile_menu_position.details: Mobile menu button (hamburger) is positioned on LEFT side of header (x=24px from left edge)

bug_fix_6_feedback_button.details: Desktop: Prominent 'Feedback' button visible in header with blue styling. Mobile: Floating action button (FAB) in bottom-right corner.

desktop_tests: Feedback button visible in header - PASS
Reset Password option in user menu - PASS
Failure Mode view panel opens - PASS
Validation dialog shows user avatar - PASS
Discipline dropdown has correct values - PASS
mobile_tests: Mobile menu button on LEFT side (x=24) - PASS
Mobile Feedback FAB in bottom-right corner - PASS
Desktop feedback button hidden on mobile - PASS
